evals.prompt: I need key usage compliance checked for server-cert.pem as a server authentication certificate.
evals.expected_output: Use the key-usage-checker skill for this key usage checker request and produce the documented result for server-cert.pem for server authentication usage.
expectations: Selects key-usage-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_key_usage.
Keeps the response focused on validating certificate key usage compliance with RFC 5280 and CA/Browser Forum Baseline Requirements.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused key usage checker workflow for server-cert.pem for server authentication usage; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the key-usage-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects key-usage-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
